experiments.next_step: No further action. 8% floor + 12% cap is optimal.

experiments.name: K-Prop 15% Edge Cap
experiments.results_so_far: Zero OVER picks generated. Cap is irrelevant.

experiments.name: OT RBI + Strikeouts Disabled
experiments.success_criteria: OT sim ROI improves to 10%+ over next 50 bets.
experiments.results_so_far: Retroactive: 84W-38L, 15.4% ROI. Forward: too early (0 bets since change).

experiments.name: TB EV Dead Zone Monitor
experiments.results_so_far: 19W-15L (55.9%), -9.6% ROI. Root cause: stale lines, NOT juice. Juice cap blocks 56% of dead zone bets. Remaining within-cap dead zone: 9W-6L, -0.0% ROI (tolerable).
experiments.next_step: No filter needed. H040 (stale line theory) tracks the WHY.

experiments.name: TB Juice Cap at -160
experiments.what_changed: TB_JUICE_CAP = -160 in oddstrader_scraper.py. Rejects TB bets with odds worse than -160.
experiments.success_criteria: Forward ROI above 15% over next 30 TB bets.
experiments.results_so_far: Retroactive: within-cap 38W-12L (76.0%, ~30% ROI). Cut: 40W-21L (65.6%, 3.8% ROI). Also resolves EV dead zone (15-25% within cap: 68.2% WR, +$419).
experiments.next_step: Track forward performance. Dead zone confirmed resolved by cap.

experiments.name: HA Line Filter (u4½ only)
experiments.what_changed: HA line filter in oddstrader_scraper.py. Only u4½ or tighter unders. u5½+ skipped.
experiments.success_criteria: HA forward ROI above 10% over next 20 HA bets.
experiments.next_step: Track next 20 HA bets under new filter.
